'''zhobataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:zhoosh|zhoosh]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-b-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zhoosh|zhoosh]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhobataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhobatithi|zhobatithi]] || [[word:zhobatiji|zhobatiji]] || [[word:zhobatishi|zhobatishi]] || [[word:zhobatiki|zhobatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhobatuthuthu|zhobatuthuthu]] || [[word:zhobatujuju|zhobatujuju]] || [[word:zhobatushushu|zhobatushushu]] || [[word:zhobatukuku|zhobatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhobatuthu|zhobatuthu]] || [[word:zhobatuju|zhobatuju]] || [[word:zhobatushu|zhobatushu]] || [[word:zhobatuku|zhobatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhobatufthuf|zhobatufthuf]] || [[word:zhobatufjuf|zhobatufjuf]] || [[word:zhobatufshuf|zhobatufshuf]] || [[word:zhobatufkuf|zhobatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhobatethe|zhobatethe]] || [[word:zhobateje|zhobateje]] || [[word:zhobateshe|zhobateshe]] || [[word:zhobateke|zhobateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhobatothotho|zhobatothotho]] || [[word:zhobatojojo|zhobatojojo]] || [[word:zhobatoshosho|zhobatoshosho]] || [[word:zhobatokoko|zhobatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhobatotho|zhobatotho]] || [[word:zhobatojo|zhobatojo]] || [[word:zhobatosho|zhobatosho]] || [[word:zhobatoko|zhobatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhobatofthof|zhobatofthof]] || [[word:zhobatofjof|zhobatofjof]] || [[word:zhobatofshof|zhobatofshof]] || [[word:zhobatofkof|zhobatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhobatĂŻfthĂŻf|zhobatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhobatĂŻfjĂŻf|zhobatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhobatĂŻfshĂŻf|zhobatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhobatĂŻfkĂŻf|zhobatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhobatĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhobatĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhobatĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhobatĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhobatĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhobatĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhobatĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhobatĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhobatĂŻfthĂŻf|zhobatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhobatĂŻfjĂŻf|zhobatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhobatĂŻfshĂŻf|zhobatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhobatĂŻfkĂŻf|zhobatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhobatĂŻfthĂŻf|zhobatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhobatĂŻfjĂŻf|zhobatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhobatĂŻfshĂŻf|zhobatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhobatĂŻfkĂŻf|zhobatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhobatĂŠthĂŠ|zhobatĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhobatĂŠjĂŠ|zhobatĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhobatĂŠshĂŠ|zhobatĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhobatĂŠkĂŠ|zhobatĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhobatathatha|zhobatathatha]] || [[word:zhobatajaja|zhobatajaja]] || [[word:zhobatashasha|zhobatashasha]] || [[word:zhobatakaka|zhobatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhobatatha|zhobatatha]] || [[word:zhobataja|zhobataja]] || [[word:zhobatasha|zhobatasha]] || [[word:zhobataka|zhobataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhobatafthaf|zhobatafthaf]] || [[word:zhobatafjaf|zhobatafjaf]] || [[word:zhobatafshaf|zhobatafshaf]] || [[word:zhobatafkaf|zhobatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhobatasha|zhobatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhobatshĂ«asha|zhobatshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhobatroasha|zhobatroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhobatmuasha|zhobatmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhobatyaasha|zhobatyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhobatnkshĂ«asha|gozhobatnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhobatnkroasha|gozhobatnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhobatnkmuasha|gozhobatnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhobatnkyaasha|gozhobatnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhobabatasha|zhobabatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhobabatshĂ«asha|zhobabatshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhobabatroasha|zhobabatroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhobabatmuasha|zhobabatmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhobabatyaasha|zhobabatyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhobabatnkshĂ«asha|gozhobabatnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhobabatnkroasha|gozhobabatnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhobabatnkmuasha|gozhobabatnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhobabatnkyaasha|gozhobabatnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhebĂŠtasha|zhebĂŠtasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhebĂŠtshĂ«asha|zhebĂŠtshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhebĂŠtroasha|zhebĂŠtroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhebĂŠtmuasha|zhebĂŠtmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhebĂŠtyaasha|zhebĂŠtyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhebĂŠtnkshĂ«asha|gozhebĂŠtnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhebĂŠtnkroasha|gozhebĂŠtnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhebĂŠtnkmuasha|gozhebĂŠtnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhebĂŠtnkyaasha|gozhebĂŠtnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhobfatasha|zhobfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhobfatshĂ«asha|zhobfatshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhobfatroasha|zhobfatroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhobfatmuasha|zhobfatmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhobfatyaasha|zhobfatyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhobfatnkshĂ«asha|gozhobfatnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhobfatnkroasha|gozhobfatnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhobfatnkmuasha|gozhobfatnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhobfatnkyaasha|gozhobfatnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
